module_contracts.purpose: Entry point: Initializes pyray and manages the high-level state machine.
Core game loop orchestration, state management, and system updates.

exports.name: GameEngine
exports.notes: Maintains lists of active entities, current credits, and wave state.

module_contracts.purpose: Class definitions for game objects with specific behaviors.

exports.name: Tower
exports.notes: Scans for targets and creates projectiles.

exports.name: Projectile
exports.notes: Moves toward target and applies damage on collision.

module_contracts.purpose: HUD and menu rendering with interaction handling.

exports.name: Interface
exports.notes: Renders text, buttons, and tower selection overlays.

module_contracts.purpose: Math helpers and visual feedback systems.

exports.name: ParticleSystem
exports.notes: Handles death bursts and fire effects.

exports.name: get_distance
exports.notes: Returns float distance between two points.

exports.name: TOWER_DATA
exports.notes: Stats for Pulse and Beam towers.

exports.name: ENEMY_DATA
exports.notes: Stats for Swarmer and Tank types.

runtime_flow: main.py initializes raylib window and global state.
engine.py loads configuration from constants.py and data/config.json.
engine.py spawns the Core and defines the path waypoints.
Input loop checks for tower placement clicks or wave start (Space).
Update loop moves enemies along path points using utils.lerp_vec2.
Towers perform distance checks against enemies and spawn Projectiles.
Projectiles check for collisions with enemies to apply damage.
UI renders current credits, health, and wave progress overlays.
On Core health <= 0, main.py switches state to GameOver.
risk_checks: Ensure Projectile target references are cleared if the Enemy is destroyed to avoid null pointer errors.
Verify that screen-to-world coordinate conversion is handled if window scaling is applied.
Check that enemy pathing logic handles the final waypoint transition to Core damage correctly.
Confirm tower range checks use squared distance for performance if many entities exist.
